Video.summary: A butterfly collector comes to Death Valley and not only finds moths but discovers his true love.
Video.title: The Chivaree

Video.summary: Two rival restaurant owners see their competition take a romantic turn.
Video.title: The Rival Hash Houses

Video.summary: A young man must prove his identity in order to marry the white girl he loves.
Video.title: Swamper Ike

Video.summary: Two men must find a way to stake a claim without going to jail.
Video.title: The Bandits of Panamint

Video.summary: An ostracized woman saves her town.
Video.title: The Diamond Babe

Video.summary: Cavalry man Larry Brooks is escorting a group through peaceful Native territory when threats arise.
Video.title: One in a Hundred

Video.summary: The discovery of a nugget weighing 12 pounds causes an uproar in a California gold town.
Video.title: The Twelve Pound Nugget

Video.summary: Lucretia's family endures years of poverty because her daydreaming husband hates steady work.
Video.title: The Rainbow Chaser

Video.summary: A newspaper man bets his girlfriend's father that he can make a fortune in three days.
Video.title: Mr. Godiva

Video.summary: Two men fight to rid Virginia City of its corrupt judicial system.
Video.title: The Light on the Mountain

Video.summary: The story of Cherokee tribesman Sequoia, who developed the Cherokee written language.
Video.title: Sequoia

Video.summary: Miners become hostile when they suspect an assayer has cheated them with deceptive evaluations.
Video.title: The Mormon's Grindstone

Video.summary: A quiet dressmaker for the dance hall girls in a Western mining camp is discovered to be Tiger Lil.
Video.title: The Little Dressmaker of Bodie

Video.summary: Bandits board a gold-carrying ship and murder most of the passengers and crew.
Video.title: I Am Joaquin

Video.summary: A prospector strikes it rich and decides to marry the girl he left behind.
Video.title: Love 'Em and Leave 'Em

Video.summary: A prospector tries to swindle a silver baron.
Video.title: Chicken Bill

Video.summary: Scout Kit Carson competes with a trapper for the hand of a Native woman.
Video.title: Spring Rendezvous

Video.summary: A wife drives a stagecoach to transport silver to Hillsboro after bandits attack her husband.
Video.title: The Saga of Sadie Orchard

Video.summary: A tomboy changes her ways when she meets the handsome constable of a mining town.
Video.title: The Indiana Girl

Video.summary: Two prospectors pull a hoax on a banker who wants their mine.
Video.title: The Great Diamond Mines

Video.summary: A desert dwelling couple struggle with life in Death Valley.
Video.title: Dress for a Desert Girl

Video.summary: Two Americans on their way to Santa Fe are captured by Mexican troops and held prisoner.
Video.title: Bread on the Desert

Video.summary: Impoverished homesteader Aaron makes a discovery with the potential to earn a fortune.
Video.title: Green Is the Color of Gold

Image.alt: Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold

Video.summary: Wagonmaster Lassen faces an unruly mob when he tries a new route to California in the 1840s.
Video.title: The Other Side of the Mountain

Image.alt: The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain
The Other Side of the Mountain

Video.summary: Pike, an irritable trapper, uses his hot temper to save himself from a run-in with Dakota Indians.
Video.title: Tall Heart, Short Temper

Video.summary: A Dakota wife left on her own becomes the unwilling servant of two opportunistic highwaymen.
Video.title: The Sage Hen

Video.summary: A woman's love inspires an aspiring preacher to stand up to a bully.
Video.title: The Other Cheek

Video.summary: John Slaughter's deputy poses a problem: the maverick is prone to violence and accepting bribes.
Video.title: A Shortcut Through Tombstone

Video.summary: Citizens gather to watch a man make good on his claim that his horse can swim the Catalina Channel.
Video.title: The World's Greatest Swimming Horse

Video.summary: A set of circumstances prevent friends from keeping control of their potential millions.
Video.title: Ten Day Millionaires

Video.summary: A former outlaw takes the unenviable job of sheriff in a lawless town, and old habits die hard.
Video.title: A Restless Man

Video.summary: An alcoholic tries to sober up long enough to save the lives of his friend and his niece.
Video.title: Solomon's Glory

Video.summary: Renegade Natives led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.
Video.title: Long Night at Fort Lonely

Video.summary: Mormons must save the life of a dying man or face the wrath of his tribe.
Video.title: A Key for the Fort

Video.summary: Lumberjack Will is attracted to the spoiled daughter of his boss, Mr. Bell.
Video.title: The Taming of Trudy Bell

Video.summary: Three orphaned children continue their parents' quest for gold.
Video.title: The Tenderfoot

Video.summary: A blue-eyed goat named Billy and a mother's ability to bake biscuits help abandoned family members.
Video.title: Biscuits and Billy the Kid

Video.summary: A peace-seeking Native scout aids pioneers besieged by Native renegades.
Video.title: The Visitor

Video.summary: A young man hunts for gold, hoping to impress his girl so she'll accept his proposal.
Video.title: The Mezcla Man

Video.summary: A young woman flirts with a ranch hand while waiting for a proposal from her beau.
Video.title: Pioneer Pluck

Video.summary: Wagon master Caleb must bring his wayward son Johnny to justice after the boy goes too far.
Video.title: A Simple Question of Justice

Video.summary: John Clum is given a task of turning a group of Apache men into a force that aids the U.S. Calvary.
Video.title: Clum's Constabulary

Video.summary: A gambler is determined to collect his poker winnings: half of Tombstone, Arizona.
Video.title: The Duke of Tombstone

Video.summary: A spectacular wrinkle develops around an aging marshal's refusal to wear glasses.
Video.title: Ton of Tin

Video.summary: An old thief outwits lawmen by returning to his rundown shack on the U.S.-Republic of Texas border.
Video.title: Old Stape

Video.summary: This tale of misadventure focuses on Frank Baum's penning of The Wonderful Wizard of Oz.
Video.title: The Wizard of Aberdeen
